none.$description: Square. Tables, full-bleed media, section dividers.

xs.$description: 4px. Nested inner corners, tight inline elements.

sm.$description: 6px. Signature control radius. Buttons, inputs, selects, small pressables.

md.$description: 8px. Comfortable controls, small badges, compact containers.

pill.$description: Fully rounded. ACCENT ONLY: chips, tags, avatars, toggles, icon buttons, one-line status. Never on wide buttons or cards.
